title: SFT Software Applications, executables, scripts
content:
SFT Software Applications, executables, scripts
HW Hardware Devices, components, schematics
DTA Data Databases, logs, research files

3. Subcategories (More Specific Classification)

Each object gets a subclassification based on the primary category.

Example for TXT (Text)
• BOOK – Novels, textbooks
• ARTICLE – News, journal papers
• DOC – Word documents, PDFs
• SCRIPT – Screenplays, coding scripts

Example for VID (Video)
• MOVIE – Films, feature-length
• SHORT – Short films
• TV – TV series, episodes
• VR – Virtual reality content

4. Format (File Type or Medium)

Identifies the format or file type:
• TXT: TXT, PDF, DOCX, EPUB
• VID: MP4, MKV, AVI
• IMG: JPG, PNG, SVG
• MUS: MP3, WAV, FLAC
• SFT: EXE, APP, JAR, BIN
• HW: PCB, STL, STEP (for 3D modeling)
• DTA: CSV, JSON, SQL
